title: hieracium cerinthoides subsp. cerinthoides
intro: Hieracium cerinthoides subsp. cerinthoides is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, known for its yellow daisy-like flowers and edible leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium cerinthoides subsp. cerinthoides include potential uses as a diuretic, to treat digestive issues, and to support liver health. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, teas, and tinctures, often used in combination with other herbs for a range of health benefits.
